name: Takashi Utsui
description: [Wakatoshi Ushijima](https://anilist.co/character/76816/Wakatoshi-Ushijima)'s father. He introduced Wakatoshi to volleyball, telling him stories about his team's reliable ace in high school. When the Ushijima family objected to Wakatoshi's left-handedness, Utsui begged the head of household to allow Wakatoshi to keep his unique trait and that it would be a strength in his future. ~!Utsui has been residing in Irvine, California and is the training coach for the Irvine Polar Bears. He also authored several books about volleyball physical training through the years!~
